notes.content: Need additional table for driver profile CLAIM requests. When User requests admin of a league to confirm it is really him.
Treba li user_id za stewarda koji piše odluke?

Also User needs to be able to claim+merge if he already has a driver. 
That will occur when admin accepts his claim.
